title: Wisely's optimized vanilla +
description: My spin on a modpack destined to be as optimized as possible while adding many QOL mods and some vanilla friendly options.
body:
Project between friends that aims to be as optimized as possible while adding many QOL mods and some vanilla friendly options.

Recommended shader for this modpack is the great BSL Shaders by CaptTatsu, link to his modpage right here :
[https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)
